task_summary: ST-9: Documents revision history, side-by-side diff, and rollback UI (web). Route /docs/history/[...path] with history view (revisions with author/editor/summary/timestamp), side-by-side diff renderer (server diff hunks: added/removed/unchanged), and staff-gated rollback wired to POST /api/docs/:id/rollback. Extended docs-client.ts with getDocHistory, getDocRevision, getDocDiff, rollbackDocPage. History affordance link in /docs/[...path]/page.tsx fixed to /docs/history/<path>.
commands_run: npx --yes pnpm@10.0.0 --filter @sfus/web exec eslint app components --ext .ts,.tsx --max-warnings=0
final_test_outcomes: AC1 PASS: History list renders revisionNumber, author/editor display, createdAt timestamp, and summary. Auto-selector populates (latest-1, latest) on load when >= 2 revisions exist.

AC2 PASS: SideBySideDiff renders added (diffLineAdded), removed (diffLineRemoved), and unchanged (diffLineUnchanged) CSS classes with line-number gutters (diffLineGutter). Friendly size-cap error on 400. 404 returns null.

AC3 PASS: isStaff gate via hasGlobalRole('moderator') hides rollback button for non-staff. rollbackDocPage POSTs with credentials and revisionNumber. Post-rollback: history reloads and diff selectors update to (rolled-back-rev, new-rev). Success/error feedback rendered.
AC4 PASS: next build and lint pass with 0 errors and 0 warnings.
docs-page.spec.ts updated: History link assertion now verifies /docs/history/<path> pattern, confirming the ST-9 affordance-link fix.
cleanup_notes: Temporary write_commit_msg.py helper removed from worktree before artifact commit.
acceptance_criteria_validated: AC1: History view lists revisions with author/editor, summary, and timestamp.
AC2: Diff view renders side-by-side using added/removed/unchanged server diff structure; 400 size-cap surfaces friendly message.
AC3: Staff rollback affordance gated by hasGlobalRole('moderator'); non-staff sees no rollback button; rollback POSTs credentials; post-rollback state updates correctly.
AC4: next build and lint pass.
implementation_context: Client: apps/web/app/docs/docs-client.ts (getDocHistory, getDocRevision, getDocDiff, rollbackDocPage added)
CSS: apps/web/app/docs/docs.module.css (history and diff classes added)
modified_files_for_documentation: apps/web/app/docs/history/[...path]/page.tsx (new route: revision history, diff, rollback UI)
apps/web/app/docs/docs-client.ts (new helpers: getDocHistory, getDocRevision, getDocDiff, rollbackDocPage; new types: DocsRevisionMetaShape, DocsSingleRevisionShape, DocsDiffHunk, DocsDiffShape)

apps/web/app/docs/docs.module.css (new classes: historyList, historyItem, historyRevNum, historyMeta, historySummary, historyActions, historyActionBtn, historyActionBtnDanger, diffContainer, diffTable, diffHeaderRow, diffLineUnchanged, diffLineAdded, diffLineRemoved, diffLineGutter, diffLineDivider, diffControls, diffControlGroup, diffControlLabel, diffSelect)
documentation_context: ST-9 adds the /docs/history/<path> route to the web layer of the Documents wiki feature.
Staff users (moderator/admin) can view revision history, compare any two revisions side-by-side, and roll back to a previous revision.
Non-staff users see history list and diff view but no rollback affordance; server gate is authoritative.
400 from diff endpoint (size cap) surfaces 'too large to compare' friendly message, not a crash.
getDocHistory/getDocDiff/rollbackDocPage follow the error-envelope pattern (payload.error.message || payload.message || fallback) consistent with the existing docs-client helpers.
History affordance link in /docs/[...path] is /docs/history/<path> (correct URL pattern).
plan_and_diff_context: Comparison base: ms5 branch (before ST-9 implementer branch was cut).
